sm.$description: Compact avatar size for dense layouts, tables, and inline references.

md.$description: Default avatar size for navigation, lists, and standard UI surfaces.

lg.$description: Large avatar size for profile headers and prominent identity surfaces.

width.$description: Default width for compact vertical navigation rails.

padding.$description: Inset padding applied around nav rail items.

gap.$description: Vertical gap between nav rail items.

radius.$description: Outer corner radius for the nav rail container.

background.$description: Container background for nav rail bars in both light and dark themes.

x.$description: Horizontal padding for each nav rail item.

y.$description: Vertical padding for each nav rail item.

gap.$description: Space between the icon and label within a nav rail item.

radius.$description: Corner radius for nav rail item surfaces.

size.$description: Default icon size for compact nav rail destinations.

default.$description: Resting surface for nav rail items.

hover.$description: Hover surface for nav rail items.

active.$description: Pressed surface for nav rail items.

selected.$description: Selected surface for the current nav rail destination.

disabled.$description: Disabled surface for nav rail items.

default.$description: Default text and icon color for nav rail items.

hover.$description: Hover text and icon color for nav rail items.

active.$description: Pressed text and icon color for nav rail items.

selected.$description: Selected text and icon color for the current nav rail destination.

disabled.$description: Disabled text and icon color for nav rail items.

ring.$description: Focus ring color for nav rail item keyboard focus.
